storyInfo: Enya, having bid farewell to Kjeragandr in the illusion, ascends Mount Karlan's peak. There she prays one last time for Kjeragandr's protection, dispersing the Catastrophe. Facing Enciodes's gambit and the tenacity of the people of Kjerag, Caster chooses to retreat.

attributes.content: The icy wind slowly comes to a stop.
An azure lake gleams above the vast, tranquil snowfield.
Kjerag's winters are cold, and the water freezes over naturally, yet its surface remains a mirror, softly reflecting the blue of the sky.
A figure appears at the center of the lake.
Kjarr...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Kjarr? Is that you?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya...
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Kjarr...?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: What should I call you... Kjarr, or Kjeragandr?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Oh you... Surely you haven't forgotten?
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Kjeragandr is what the people of the past named me.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: But Kjarr? Kjarr shall always be head maid to the lady Enya.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Enya thought of many things she wanted to say during her long journey here.

These thoughts sway through her mind alongside all the questions she wants to ask, like a cup filled to the brim. From time to time it would make some noise, but now that she looks inside after her eternity of waiting, she finds it dry, long dry.
What should she say? What could she say?
The friend she was searching for stands before her, her warm hands caressing her cheeks and the tip of her nose. Just like she always did.
While I can't say it's entirely unexpected, I am still pleasantly surprised you managed to find this place in the end.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I was really worried about you, Kjarr...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I didn't know where you went, and the people were terrified after the Catastrophe struck. I had no choice but to go on the Pilgrimage as the Saintess.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I went by many places... before ultimately discovering these ruins atop Mount Karlan.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Did you say... you went on the Pilgrimage? In this season? You... You idiot!
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Well...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Ah, forgive me. As a maid, I should not speak to the Saintess in such a manner.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Enya... I'm just glad you're alright.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Her friend's voice is still as dear as it ever was.
Kjarr...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Those visions I saw just now, were they the Kjerag of the past?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: They were. Those were my memories.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Memories of when I walked the land alongside the people countless years ago. The tale of how the Kjerag of then became the Kjerag of today.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: You are here in the forbidden land of Kjeragandr's body, and so through her eyes, you may witness history a thousand years past.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I'm... in Kjeragandr's body?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: How should I explain it... You started in my arm and crawled your way into my chest.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: This lake... Is it an illusion?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Is this the Heart of Karlan?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The Heart of Karlan is actually the name of this lake. What you see is how it was a thousand years ago.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: At the time, in the depths of the mountains, there was a lake that remained unfrozen year-round.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Desperate wanderers discovered this precious source of water, and here they took root and multiplied. In time, they came to see it as a heart.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: 'The heart pulsed, and Karlan's flesh began to grow.'
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: And so the people built an altar here, so that they may honor the miracle that Kjeragandr blessed them with...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I saw the statue in the ruins. It was huge, exquisite.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Completely unlike the statue by Lake Silberneherze that we referenced ancient texts for. Was it something only people who have seen the real 'you' could have made?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: What... are you, Kjarr?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Hooh... Now that's a question and a half. What a headache...
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: A very, very, very long time ago, I only knew that my body was massive, no different from the mountains and rivers themselves.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: The land once teemed with my kin. Before that darkness descended, they already had names assigned to them by beings of the past.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: 'Feranmuts', 'children of the planet', 'lords of the land'...
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: In comparison, I am not that much older than your most ancient civilizations.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: If you were to ask me, I prefer to see myself as a form of life. Really, I much prefer the name Kjeragandr.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: Unfortunately, I am not what the people crave. I am not a 'god' who has power over all.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: But they still treat you as one. They believe in the commandments you have given, and ascribe everything to you, good and bad.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: And those Saintesses, they...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: That was not my intention.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I once went to sleep for a time, but apparently, my departure terrified the people. As they tried to search for me, to rouse me, they became lost.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I sealed this place away, in the hope that the people would forget this terrible mistake of the long past.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I know that, of course I do!
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You're not some evil, sinister spirit who would smile in the face of innocent girls freezing to death...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya raises her hands, holding onto the warm hands cupping her cheeks.
I am not the god the people need... nor have I ever given any commandments.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I am nothing but another one of the lives born upon this land, born without rhyme or reason. How could I possibly have any wise words of survival to pass on?
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: But when I took the form of man and walked among you, I discovered to my surprise that though your people are frail, you possess an innate, near-instinctual power.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: One that allows you to help one another, to overcome all difficulties and survive upon this dangerous land.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: In your language, this power is known as 'virtue'.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: So... that's how it all came to be...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: It was not I who taught you, but rather, it was you who taught me the meaning of life.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: As for the name of Kjeragandr, and the form that represents Her, those are creations of men.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: But I do not believe them to be lies. The name of Kjeragandr is how the power you wield manifests itself. Nothing more.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I think... this is the Kjeragandr you seek.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: 'And so She said: my path is, in the end, your path...'
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: People tried to confirm Her appearance, but ultimately, they were only attempting to see clearly who they themselves were.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: But the paths people walk are for the most part not level roads. Most of the time, they are like confused burdenbeasts, circling about the same place, over and over...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The people of Kjerag once brought you back among us, and so our faith was steadied...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Kjarr... Will you come back?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya...
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I think... I can't stay by your side, this time around.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: ...But you promised me.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You told me that you wouldn't just leave all of a sudden, that She wouldn't simply spirit you away...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya... Listen to me, Enya.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I'm afraid I have to break my promise this time... but I never meant to lie to you. Never.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: You are my friend. Out of countless years and countless people, my one and only friend.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I wanted to accompany you forever, until the end of your days... I even thought I would be the one left behind, to endure our separation.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: But... what happened?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: What could possibly have happened to force you to leave?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: There is no such thing as an eternal union. Parting is simply a matter of time.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: And my time has come... That is all.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: I just didn't want the day to come so quickly.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Things happen at their most suited hour.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: You are unlike the other children who call out my name. You are not some helpless girl waiting for my answer as you are pushed about.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: ...I started out the same as them.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: But now, you walk the path of your own choosing.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: You were able to find the solution in your own heart. You have braved great trials I know nothing of, experienced great danger I could not help you with. And now, you stand before me.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: You are my Enya. My sweet, sweet Enya.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: You are the little burdenbeast who managed to jump the fence. You have a heart that resists all discipline and a bright, witty mind. You are the first Saintess to come pray with resentment and bitterness in her heart.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: The snows of Karlan are tall and far, as pure white as stacked clouds. The wind blows from deep ravines, gently sweeping by the great land of Kjerag.
Snowflakes fall from the wind's embrace and melt with spring. They travel through Karlan's streams into the lake, then seep into the depths of the earth.
From there, the sun's rays lift the water, the mists returning to the horizon. They pile up into clouds, before turning into the next round of snow.
Their hands refuse to let go of each other. The warmth as they lean upon one another lights a spark in their bodies.
Go, Enya.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: ...But where?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Go drive away the last of the darkness, and usher in a new tomorrow.
attributes.name: Kjeragandr

attributes.content: The illusion disappears, like waking from a dream. The cave is still as gloomy as it was earlier. The Saintess of Kjerag turns to the massive statue.
...Drive away the last of the darkness, usher in... a new tomorrow.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Broken clumps of snow spiral around her, before being dispersed by the wind.
A single snowflake remains in the palm of her hand. A perfect, flawless hexagon.
It does not melt, nor flit through the air. It simply waits quietly like a guardian, unmoving for eons.
Not even asking me my opinion before giving this to me... You know I don't like taking the spotlight...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You're just so willful...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: AHHHH—!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Thank goodness, you're finally awake!
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Did I... pass out?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: You did! Both of you did when Enya touched the statue. You've been out for about five minutes.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: I didn't think it would be that short a time...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Did you... see it?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I did!
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: I had a terrible nightmare. I was chasing down some game, when my illness suddenly got a lot worse. My entire arm turned to stone...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: But then I saw someone who looked a lot like Kjeragandr, and she cured me in my dream.
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Then she comforted me, telling me the stone disease isn't Kjeragandr's punishment, and that I'm not a bad girl...
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: Saintess! Could she have... been Kjeragandr Herself? We... We found Her, right?
attributes.name: Joanna

attributes.content: We did. That must have been Kjeragandr you saw.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: What are you two talking about? How come I'm the only one who didn't see anything?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Don't worry about it.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: She simply gave each of us the answer we needed.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Enya... I...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Maybe... Maybe I need to revise my hypothesis and calculations.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: If it wasn't a special vein of ore that protected Kjerag from Catastrophe for a millennium... Add to that all we've seen in this cave...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Though I still can't bring myself to believe in things like Feranmuts, which are completely incompatible with our scientific system...
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: But... having eliminated everything false, then the only possibility left must be the truth, no matter how absurd it may be.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Enya, could you tell me...?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The Kjeragandr you saw... What was...?
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: The Saintess stretches out her hand, softly stroking the perplexed woman's head, treating her like any other devotee who has come to her for confession.
I can't explain what the Kjeragandr in our hearts is, in scientific terms...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: But as a scientist, how could you possibly fear the unknown?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I would never—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Kjeragandr might not be something completely incompatible with science.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Perhaps you have discovered a little corner of a field that science has yet to set foot on?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: ...Oh, shoot.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: When we were climbing the mountain, the Catastrophe warning went up another level.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Basically, within the next three hours, there's a seventy-two percent chance Kjerag will be hit by a second Catastrophe.
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Enya, we need to go and tell everyone to evacuate right away—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: We won't make it in time...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: ...I still have one last thing I must do.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Wait, where are you going—
attributes.name: Elena

attributes.content: Elena and Joanna follow along behind Enya, the three of them running through the passage they came through.
At the entrance of the cave, they see a familiar figure once again.
They are unsure why, but in the short time they were away, the old man seems to have aged ten years.
I saw...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I saw Her, and Her footprints in the snow...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I was... an unforgivable, faithless man... all along...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The elder of the Vine-Bead Court falls to the ground, as if all the strength has been sapped from him.
...I once endured the tangling of love and pain alongside a friend, as we waited for daybreak to wash over the mountains.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: The road we walked was far longer than the road leading up Karlan.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The Saintess's finger traces out a shallow arc across the old man's forehead, from left to right.
Her fingertip streaks across his graying brow, anointing him with unmelted snow, like how the most pious of Kjerag clerics would dispel spirits and make prayers for newborn babes.
I still remember her. The girl who would ask me to teach her, even when it came to darning clothes.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: How the living should be saved, how order should operate... You did not know, but She... was also learning from you.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: She watches all you do. She wishes to walk with you, whether you walk down the right path or the wrong.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: She never meant to deny you.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Her Saintess has heard your confession, and in Her name, absolves you of your sin of disbelief.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr, you walk with Her.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Unstoppable tears flow from his aged eyes. They seep into the earth, like fallen snow.
I must admit, I once looked down upon you, and upon Kjerag.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: That battleship behind you is the result of over a decade of painstaking nation-building.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Although I am not entirely sure why you changed your mind on keeping your 'secret weapon' here concealed...
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: But no matter. If one were to survey the entirety of Terra, how many people who could do all this would one find?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: You have earned my praise, Silverash.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I thank Your Grace for your approval, but as I see it, what is more regretful is that...
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: If Victoria were still the mighty empire it once was, you would not pay much heed to the profit you could extract from a measly speck such as Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Who would have thought the prediction that arrogant youth gave during that one banquet would become so dangerously accurate?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: In the end, there are none who can save Victoria from its misfortunate decline.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Though it is not hard to see where history's river is taking you, to change its course requires the hand of fate on your side. There is pride to be had in your foresight.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I have never been scornful of your talent. In all truth, I have had my fair share of wondering how things would be now had I kept you in Victoria back then.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Would you be a general with the name of Caster, or perhaps a famed marquis? A future where... I would not have curtailed whatever achievements you acquired.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Regardless of the details, it would have been much better than the situation we find ourselves in now.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: If this is what Your Grace truly believes, then I hope there is still the opportunity to accept such an invitation.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Oh, don't make that sort of joke, or I might just start expecting it.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Haha...
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I presume you have exhausted all the words of rancor in your heart to curse my dastardly cunning?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I never had any in the first place. If you lose the wager, you must pay. This is the most basic of preparations any player of this game would have made.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Besides, you are simply here to retrieve the profits you are owed from the many years of trade between Victoria and Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: But no matter. I must thank you for coming here in person today to sign this agreement with me. You will be giving Kjerag a priceless opportunity.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Haha... A priceless opportunity?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Let us return to the topic at hand. You being here must mean you agree to all contents of the pact.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: All contents? I am afraid not... I must dissent with the agreement's particulars.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Oho, you still wish to bargain, even at this hour?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Alright then, let's hear it. Which clauses do you disagree with?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I know you intend for Caster and Kjerag to start a joint mining program, so that you may partake in forty percent of the extraction of Kjerag's minerals, including Originium and Oriron.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: By my reckoning, this number could be increased to eighty percent.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Kjerag has ample mineral wealth, enough for the development of both our nations.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Victoria will offer mining equipment and specialist training to Kjerag as a means of aid, and we are more than happy to welcome in the workers and technology consultants you send.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: However... we will, from now on, not allow a single Victorian soldier to pass our borders.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Ah, yes, the one clause regarding 'the distribution of mineral extraction profits between Victoria and Kjerag as dictated by equal negotiation'. I have my issues with that as well.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Kjerag shall have complete and absolute sovereignty over all resources within our borders. Victoria has no right to interfere.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: In regards to Victorian aid, we give our thanks. Victoria shall enjoy preferential prices for all commodities Kjerag sells her.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Naturally, the aid you have offered shall be repaid in equivalent value, so Victoria must import a sufficient amount of goods from Kjerag on an annual basis—the amount of which shall also be decided by Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Don't be like this, Enciodes.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Such unreasonable demands ill behoove one conceding defeat.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: 'Conceding defeat'? I do not recall ever uttering such words during my time aboard the Gloriana.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Hah.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Why exactly do you think I would agree to your revisions? You've lost your mind.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I have faith that you will agree.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: ...What in the...?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: This is the bargaining chip I have brought with me today.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I am terribly sorry. We are of the belief that using military force to dictate a bilateral agreement is hardly reasonable.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: But this may be the only form of negotiation you are willing to accept.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: What was that?!
attributes.name: Victorian Officer

attributes.content: Who's firing at us?!
attributes.name: Victorian Officer

attributes.content: It's that battleship! Dammit, there's only the one, how can it have that much firepower?!
attributes.name: Victorian Officer

attributes.content: No, that's not it!
attributes.name: Victorian Soldier

attributes.content: It looked like the cannonfire came from the mountains!
attributes.name: Victorian Soldier

attributes.content: Keep them coming!
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Keep those hands moving, don't give the Victorians a chance to breathe!
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: You there, big guy. Can't you load these shells any faster?
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: On it, ma'am!
attributes.name: Tschäggättä

attributes.content: You shouldn't be moving about so much, Rus. You need to mind your health—
attributes.name: Yucatan

attributes.content: Shut it!
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Enciodes stashed some lovely little things up here in the mountains, and I finally have a golden opportunity to play with these new toys!
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: On my order! Aim at Caster's flagship, then fire!
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Let them get a taste of Kjeragandr's protection!
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Madam Sciurus, the mission Sir Enciodes entrusted us with was intimidating Caster's fleet. Please keep in mind that he is still aboard the Gloriana.
attributes.name: Weiss

attributes.content: If you do not follow the plan, I shall be forced to stop you.
attributes.name: Weiss

attributes.content: I know, I know... Sheesh, can't even take a joke.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: These are the secrets my sister and Enciodes had been keeping quiet about this whole time.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: You really are something, Weiss. The Victorians were scouring the mountains for Enciodes's arsenal, but they never would've expected it was right in front of their eyes, in our logistics vehicles.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: I can't believe she'd hide this even from me... Ratatos, the next time I see you, I'm going to—
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: This was the most... crucial mission Sir Enciodes gave me.
attributes.name: Weiss

attributes.content: These weapons... Their scale, their very existence, is Kjerag's greatest secret. Even now.
attributes.name: Weiss

attributes.content: We still need to keep quiet about them. Our biggest trump card is that the Victorians have no idea how much military power we have.
attributes.name: Weiss

attributes.content: We need to keep Caster's judgment off-balance.
attributes.name: Weiss

attributes.content: Nobody can really say what would happen if her fleet really did take one step forward, after all...
attributes.name: Weiss

attributes.content: I am well aware of the situation right now. You don't need to explain it to me bit by bit.
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: Ratatos... This time, make sure you take care of yourself...
attributes.name: Sciurus

attributes.content: (Whispers) Your Grace, we still have no way of confirming the artillery's whereabouts.
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: We have informed all ships to enter defense mode—
attributes.name: Trilby Asher

attributes.content: No need for your report. All you need to know is that, at this very moment, there are enough large-scale cannons in Mount Karlan to shred the entirety of your fleet.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: All your ships are within range.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: ...You think two shells is enough for me to believe you have the power to annihilate my fleet?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: D5, east, two hundred meters.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: The moment Enciodes speaks, a precision shell lands by the eastern flank of the Gloriana. The blast wave lifts up the hems of the pair's clothes.
It seems there is no need for further proof.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Surely this weaponry is not the product of your own research?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Which of them has been helping you, Gododdin? Normandy?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Is that really such an important question right now?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You may cut off Kjerag's connections to our allies, but we have our ways of finding new ones.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Such painstaking effort just for your opening...
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Merely tactics we were forced to use.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: With such limited time, Kjerag's military development had no choice but to pursue another specialization.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Even if we were given another ten years, I fear Kjerag would still be unable to muster up a fleet that could stand against yours.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: But it seems your formidable vessels have made you forget that the battlefield is not only a clash between warships.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Kjerag only means to defend ourselves, and we have no intention of robbing other nations of their coin. So compared to high-speed battleships, we went for a more suitable option.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Our mountains form a natural barrier. When lined with artillery, they serve as a natural shield, an aegis you have no hope of breaking.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: But when all is said and done, if you had not prematurely treated these 'negotiations' as a surrender, you would not have fallen into such passivity.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Hmph...
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Then... You are determined to open hostilities with me today.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Hardly, hardly.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Just as how your fleet did not come here with intent to wage war with Kjerag, my goal today is simply to facilitate a discussion.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I too have prepared an agreement for you. It contains various clauses on things such as tariffs between Victoria and Kjerag and our joint mining projects. You may look over it now.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Once you have signed it, Kjerag will be happy to escort you back safely to Victoria.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You think you can threaten me like this, child?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Too radical a stance at the negotiating table will only serve to betray your lack of confidence.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: If I call your bluff and order my ships forward, then things will get ugly.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: It would be an incredible shame.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I had considered this possibility before I came to these talks.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: It's just that, if people far in the future were to discuss how the Duke of Caster and some insignificant nobody died fighting each other in the snow, why, that would certainly bring shame to the Caster name, perhaps even all Victoria.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: But in Kjerag? If I am gone, there are countless others who will do what I would have done. They will continue developing Kjerag until she has become a nation none can sneer at.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I know that accepting such an unfair agreement must also be a difficult choice for you.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I can give you half an hour—but know this. For every minute you hesitate, all energy prices mentioned in the agreement will increase, just a little. A condition Victoria cannot refuse.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: This is the price you must pay for trampling across our land.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Ah!
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: There's... There's just... so much blood...
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: Degenbrecher!
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: She needs emergency treatment. You got any more bandages here?
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: I... I'll go find some!
attributes.name: Ratatos

attributes.content: Degenbrecher... How did you get so hurt?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: She held off seventeen Trilby Ashers by herself. She's something, alright.
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: The enemy's retreated for now, so my team will take over guarding this place from her.
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: But there's still so many Victorian soldiers out there... What will you...?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: I'll keep going until my mission is complete.
attributes.name: Sharp

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: More people are going to get hurt...
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: Is something going on outside again?
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: Let me reconfirm: orders are to... carry out a frontal assault on the Vine-Bead Court?
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: Assault the Vine-Bead Court and rescue the abducted Victorian citizen.
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: ...And capture Ratatos, who might be carrying key military secrets of Kjerag.
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: ...Acknowledged.
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: All hands, load live ammunition.
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: We storm the Court.
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: Before you is holy ground. None may enter as they please.
attributes.name: Pious Cleric

attributes.content: Please leave.
attributes.name: Pious Cleric

attributes.content: If you don't wish to be harmed, then let us through. That is an order.
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: Are you... refusing?
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: You have obeyed your orders in coming here. So too, do we obey Kjeragandr's commands as we do the same.
attributes.name: Pious Cleric

attributes.content: Let us follow our hearts, and do what we must do.
attributes.name: Pious Cleric

attributes.text: Enya has changed into her most solemn of clothes, treading once more onto the road that tested the Saintesses.
She thinks of the countless Saintesses of a millennium ago who walked this rocky path. Her every step echoes with theirs across the ages.
What wishes did they carry with them when they met with the Kjeragandr of their hearts? Did any of them question the existence of their god, and did any of them receive Her favor?
As for her... How did she climb this mountain the first time around?
It was such a long time ago. The emotions she felt have become hazy. Her memories of the time have begun to deform.
Enya never thought this road could be so smooth, so friendly.
As if she were taking a relaxing walk home, or preparing to go meet a dear friend whom she had not seen in a long while.
The gray-yellow sky is covered in thick clouds, streaked with faint lightning. The chill winds have picked up.
Enya kneels, shuts her eyes, and begins to pray.

attributes.content: If... you can still hear my voice.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: If you are still the merciful Kjeragandr who loves all men who live here...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: My beloved Kjeragandr, this is the last time... I ask that you hear my prayer.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I have asked countless times what made Kjerag Kjerag, what made us the way we are.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Your existence might not be the answer to this question, but it is still a... small miracle, one to rejoice in.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I want to believe that the things you left upon this land are blessings, not shackles.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Throughout the centuries, you have accompanied our civilization as it grew, as a loving and wise teacher.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: And centuries from now, the people of this land will have the power to move mountains and touch the sky, yet they shall still praise your name.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: We will remember your kindness. We will thank you for your companionship. We will leave the cradle of your protection.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: I ask that you allow me to be your vicar, so that I may protect Kjerag one last time.
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: This is my... final prayer...
attributes.name: Enya

attributes.content: Light shines from her palm. A gentle force calms the raging wind, stilling even the flow of time itself across this ancient land.
The Catastrophe clouds begin to scatter. The dread disaster about to strike the land has been subdued by some awesome might.
The clouds part, showering the devout woman in a kindly radiance.
The wind stops.
A Catastrophe alert?!
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: That's some good timing. We only just installed this warning device, and it's already coming in handy!
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: We need to inform the government to evacuate people right away... Oh no, the danger level—
attributes.name: Rhine Lab Researcher

attributes.content: The alert... stopped all of a sudden?
attributes.name: Kjerag Researcher

attributes.content: But how...? This steep drop in Originium energy fluctuations... Are the monitors broken, or...?
attributes.name: Kjerag Researcher

attributes.content: By Kjeragandr...
attributes.name: Kjerag Researcher

attributes.content: The old man hobbles along the rugged trail, walking towards the depths of the mountains. It is where he has consigned himself to.
He stops by the side of a cliff.
Why do you wish to jump?
All my life... I have lived a lie.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I should have been Her servant... but I deceived Her. Deceived myself.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: It was my arrogance, my impiety, that led me down this undignified and evil road.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: I cannot... forgive myself. All I can do is end this sinful life.
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: But if this is how you go, all the snows can do is bury your body. They can't cover up your mistakes.
attributes.name: Passing Girl

attributes.content: No confession comes too late. You need only repent in your heart, and you will be reborn.
attributes.name: Passing Girl

attributes.content: You know, I can't quite recall... Kjeragandr, is that what She said?
attributes.name: Passing Girl

attributes.content: As Kjerag's most knowledgeable elder, there is still much you can do, right?
attributes.name: Passing Girl

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: The sky suddenly clears, the fierce sunlight dazzling the old man's eyes.
He sees the rays of light tear through the clouds. His chest, too, seems to burn.
Is this... a miracle...?
attributes.name: Adso

attributes.content: Just this once, Enya... From now on, everything really is in your hands.
attributes.name: Passing Girl

attributes.content: Sorry. When the time is right, I'll come see you.
attributes.name: Passing Girl

attributes.content: This is your final warning. This operation is not targeted at Kjerag's civilians. Please leave immediately!
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: If you refuse to cooperate, we cannot guarantee your safety.
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: The officer raises his blade high as he gives the civilians a stern warning, but none of them budge.
Soon, more and more people begin to gather.
Clerics, craftsmen, herdsmen, merchants... They stand across from the soldiers by their own accord, forming a silent wall.
One person squeezes out from the crowd. She raises her hands, walking between the two groups.
Several operators dressed in Rhodes Island uniforms follow behind her.
I'm... the 'hostage' you said you were going to rescue.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: The people of Kjerag never abducted me. In fact, it was Victorian agents who trapped me in there, trying to destroy the evidence I have of Victorian operations in Kjerag. They even harmed the people trying to protect me.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: All the evidence, that evidence you want so badly, is hidden somewhere you cannot touch. If you make any further moves, it will be immediately released to the public.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: If you still want to silence me, then do as you will.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: But these crimes you have committed on sovereign Kjerag land, under the banner of 'nobility'... You will never be able to cover them up.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: We're not any sort of superior civilization. We're just better at cheating and swindling.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: Just stop it already... This farce.
attributes.name: Alberta

attributes.content: You...
attributes.name: Victorian Commander

attributes.content: The gloomy sky suddenly clears. As one, everyone lifts their heads.
The clouds covering the heavens disperse, replaced by a rainbow spanning the horizon.
And so, all cruelty and fear are wiped from the hearts of men.
The sunlight dazzles the eyes, as if it were advice, or perhaps deterrent.
The soldiers cannot help but lay down their arms.
Time is short.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I am afraid that things will not turn for the better, if you delay.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: What is Your Grace's decision?
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I am suddenly reminded of something you once said...
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I could never imagine what sort of power a united nation might possess... Is today the day I get to experience it for myself?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: What you see is but one minute aspect of it. If you ever have the chance to deepen your understanding of her, I believe you will be very much pleasantly surprised.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: In truth, this is a topic I only fully understood long after I left Victoria. Perhaps it can also answer the question you posed me.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Why once-great empires become feeble, and how poor lands can stand tall.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: A nation's government, its institutions... Whether its leader is the Lord of Lions or Parliament, whether Saintess or the Clans.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: These are important things to consider, yes... but the crux shall forever be the people.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Just as a great navigator cannot hope to lead a hole-pocked flotilla forward, no leader can change the fate of a nation using solely their own strength.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: You say that, yet your words do not agree with your actions.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Were you not prepared to change the destiny of all Kjerag with your own two hands?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: I believe in the people who live upon this land. People of faith.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: I know you have devised all sorts of means to confirm if the mysterious power of the famed Kjeragandr truly does protect Kjerag.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: What you see, what blocks your way, is indeed Kjeragandr's might.
attributes.name: Enciodes

attributes.content: Haha... You are the same as you ever were.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Still so full of mettle, so eager to display yourself... Impressive.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: This little gamble of yours has managed to get the better of me... But this time, I will not let you off easy the way I do with mediocre men.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: And so—
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: ...Huh?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: What... is that?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: The people on deck look to the distance.
They see the thick clouds layered across the sky be torn open by some divine power. They see the ancient Mount Karlan, bathed in radiance.
It is a beautiful sight. Enough to stir the hearts of people, and inspire reverence.
Is it Her wroth, or Her mercy?
The word 'holy' might never have come to the minds of the irreligious, but at this moment, the same thought blooms in the hearts of all.
This is a pure land, one that must not be violated.
Your Grace... Our intelligence indicates that this 'Kjeragandr' has already vanished from Kjerag.
attributes.name: Anxious Soldier

attributes.content: But we cannot confirm what is causing this phenomenon in the sky.
attributes.name: Anxious Soldier

attributes.content: What should we do, Your Grace?
attributes.name: Anxious Soldier

attributes.content: I had wanted to see this gamble through...
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: But unfortunately, they have added one last weight to the balance, and we cannot stop the scales of victory from pointing their way.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: What more can we even do?
attributes.name: Duke of Caster

attributes.content: Sound the retreat.
attributes.name: Duke of Caster
